metadata.description: Productivity-grade (Lite) Kiteworks agents for Claude — direct-MCP, best-effort. NOT the audited Kiteworks compliance runtime, not audit-defensible, and not a basis for deletion decisions.

plugins.name: activity-digest
plugins.description: Summarizes what's new or changed in a Kiteworks folder over a time window, and can save a report.

plugins.name: ccpa-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal information, external sharing, and retention gaps under CCPA/CPRA, and saves a report.

plugins.name: cis-controls-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for sensitive content and external sharing under CIS Controls v8's Data Protection control, and saves a report. Most of CIS Controls is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: cmmc-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for CUI-marked content and external sharing under CMMC 2.0, and saves a report. SSP authorship and SPRS scoring are outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: contract-radar
plugins.description: Finds contracts, agreements, and renewal-related documents in a Kiteworks folder, and can save a report.

plugins.name: document-summarizer
plugins.description: Finds a file in Kiteworks (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, Excel, or text) and summarizes it for you, checking it's virus/DLP-clean first and never repeating sensitive numbers like IDs verbatim -- and can save the summary back next to the file.

plugins.name: dora-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for external sharing of ICT-related documentation under DORA, and saves a report. Most of DORA is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: dpdpa-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal data, external sharing, and retention gaps under India's DPDPA, and saves a report.

plugins.name: duplicate-finder
plugins.description: Finds duplicate files in a Kiteworks folder and, once you approve, moves the extra copies to a review folder so you can reclaim space.

plugins.name: ear-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for export-controlled technology descriptions and external/foreign sharing under EAR, and saves a report. ECCN classification is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: eu-ai-act-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for AI-related documents that are shared externally or contain personal/biometric data, under the EU AI Act. Most of the EU AI Act is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: fedramp-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for the narrow slice of FedRAMP a file-sharing platform can actually see -- sensitive content and external sharing -- and saves a report. Most of FedRAMP is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: folder-expiry-audit
plugins.description: Reports which Kiteworks folders have an expiry/retention policy configured and which don't.

plugins.name: gdpr-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal data, external sharing, and files older than your retention policy under GDPR, and saves a report. Covers the same ground GDPR's storage-limitation and exposure concerns care about.

plugins.name: hipaa-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for PHI-shaped content, external sharing, and files past HIPAA's 6-year documentation-retention window, and saves a report.

plugins.name: inbox-triage
plugins.description: Sorts files sitting in a Kiteworks inbox or uploads folder into the right project folders, and moves them once you approve the matches.

plugins.name: intake-form-builder
plugins.description: Builds a Kiteworks intake or request form from a short description of what you need to collect.

plugins.name: invoice-organizer
plugins.description: Finds invoices and receipts in a Kiteworks folder (including photos and scans), pulls out vendor, date, amount, and tax info, and -- once you approve -- renames them consistently and gives you a categorized spreadsheet for expenses or taxes.

plugins.name: ism-au-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for classification-marked content and external sharing under Australia's ISM, and saves a report. Most of ISM is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: iso27001-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for the narrow slice of ISO 27001 a file-sharing platform can actually see -- sensitive content and external sharing -- and saves a report. Most of ISO 27001 is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: iso27701-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal data, external sharing, and retention gaps under ISO 27701's privacy management scope, and saves a report.

plugins.name: iso42001-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for AI-related documents that are shared externally or contain personal data, under ISO 42001. Most of ISO 42001 is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: itar-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for ITAR-controlled technical-data content and external/foreign sharing, and saves a report. Export licensing determinations are outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: lgpd-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal data, external sharing, and retention gaps under Brazil's LGPD, and saves a report.

plugins.name: naming-cleanup
plugins.description: Cleans up inconsistent or version-sprawled file names in a Kiteworks folder, and renames them once you approve.

plugins.name: nis2-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for external sharing of flagged documentation under NIS2, and saves a report. Most of NIS2 is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: nist-800-53-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for CUI/PII-shaped content and external sharing under NIST SP 800-53, and saves a report. Most of the control catalog is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: nist-ai-rmf-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for AI-related documents that are shared externally or contain personal data, under NIST AI RMF. Most of NIST AI RMF is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: nist-csf-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for external sharing exposure, the one sliver of NIST CSF's Protect function a file-sharing platform can see, and saves a report. Most of NIST CSF is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: nzism-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for classification-marked content and external sharing under New Zealand's NZISM, and saves a report. Most of NZISM is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: offboarding-content-finder
plugins.description: Finds everything a departing or transferring employee owns across Kiteworks, and moves confirmed items to a holding folder for review.

plugins.name: pci-dss-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for card-data-shaped content and external sharing under PCI DSS, and saves a report. Network/tokenisation architecture is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: redactor
plugins.description: Finds and replaces specific text -- like a name or other sensitive information -- across documents in a Kiteworks folder, and creates redacted copies once you approve. Originals are never changed.

plugins.name: retention-sweeper
plugins.description: Finds files in a Kiteworks folder that are past a retention deadline you set, and can save a report of what it found.

plugins.name: section-508-compliance-check
plugins.description: Runs a real accessibility structure check (tagged PDFs, document metadata, alt text across PDF/DOCX/PPTX/HTML) over documents in a Kiteworks folder under Section 508, and saves a report. This is not a full VPAT/ACR conformance test.

plugins.name: sensitive-content-scanner
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for sensitive terms and common PII (like SSNs, credit card numbers, and IBANs) before you share it, and can save a report.

plugins.name: sharing-auditor
plugins.description: Finds what's shared inside a Kiteworks folder so you can review who has access, and can save a report.

plugins.name: soc2-compliance-check
plugins.description: Checks a Kiteworks folder for the narrow slice of SOC 2 a file-sharing platform can actually see -- sensitive content and external sharing -- and saves a report. Most of SOC 2 is outside what this can check; it says so.

plugins.name: storage-visualizer
plugins.description: Shows what's taking up space in a Kiteworks folder -- totals, the largest files and folders, and how much is shared -- and can save a report.

plugins.name: vn-pdpl-compliance-check
plugins.description: Scans a Kiteworks folder for personal data, external sharing, and retention gaps under Vietnam's PDPL, and saves a report.

plugins.name: wcag-compliance-check
plugins.description: Runs a real accessibility structure check (tagged PDFs, document metadata, alt text across PDF/DOCX/PPTX/HTML) over documents in a Kiteworks folder under WCAG, and saves a report. This is not a full WCAG conformance test.
